---
title: "Finnish Greenhouse Productivity"
---

## Row
```{python}

# scatter with circles encoding area

import altair as alt
from altair.datasets import data
import pandas as pd
from scipy.cluster.hierarchy import linkage, leaves_list


# Preprocessing
df = pd.read_csv("gh_yields.csv")
# df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)
df['ProdChange'] = df.groupby('Crop')['Productivity'].transform(
    lambda x: x.ffill().pct_change() * 100) 

def get_common_base_year(df, variables):
    return (
        df.dropna(subset=variables)
          .groupby('Crop')['Year']
          .min()
    )

def transform_index(df, variables):
    base_year = get_common_base_year(df, variables)
    
    indices = {'Year': df['Year'], 'Crop': df['Crop']}
    
    for v in variables:
        base_values = (
            df.set_index(['Crop', 'Year'])[v]
        )
        
        indices[v] = df.groupby('Crop')[v].transform(
            lambda x: x / base_values.loc[x.name, base_year.loc[x.name]] * 100
        )
    
    return pd.DataFrame(indices)

df['Year'] = df['Year'].astype(str)

indices = transform_index(df, ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'])

def transform_index(df, variable):
    return df.groupby('Crop')[variable].transform(
    lambda x: x / x[~x.isna()].iloc[0] * 100) 



df['AreaIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Area')
    

df['YieldIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Yield')

df['ProdIndex'] = transform_index(df, 'Productivity')

by_area = df.groupby('Crop')['Area'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False).index.to_list()

by_median = df.groupby('Crop')['ProdChange'].median().sort_values(ascending=False).index.to_list()

```
```{python}

# Visualization

WIDTH = 400
RED = 'rgb(228, 129, 105)'

crop = alt.selection_point(encodings=['y'], empty=False)



sort_labels = ['Cumulative Area', 'Median % Change in Efficiency']

sort_values = ['area', 'median']

import numpy as np

order_df = pd.DataFrame({
    'Crop': np.concat([by_area, by_median]),
    'sort_mode': np.repeat(sort_values, len(by_area)),
    'rank': np.tile(np.arange(len(by_area)), 2)
})


dropdown = alt.binding_select(options=sort_values, labels=sort_labels, name='Sort Crops By:')

sort_param = alt.param(
    name="sort_mode",
    bind=dropdown
)

color = (
    alt.when(crop)
    .then(alt.ColorValue("steelblue"))
    .otherwise(alt.ColorValue("grey"))
)

base = alt.Chart(df, height=500,
width=WIDTH)

bar = base.mark_bar().encode(
    y=alt.X('Crop:N').sort('-x').axis(None),
    x=alt.X('sum(Area):Q').title("Cumulative Cultivation Area (Square Meters)"),
    color=color
).add_params(crop)


# Crop names
middle = base.encode(
    alt.Y('Crop:N').axis(None).sort(by_area),
    alt.Text('Crop:N'),
    alt.Color('Crop:N').scale(scheme='tableau20')
).mark_text().properties(width=100).add_params(crop)

# TODO: in order to sort order, calculate the sort manually.
boxplots = base.mark_boxplot(extent=0,
    box={'fill': 'transparent', 'stroke': 'black'}, 
    median={'stroke': 'black'},
    outliers={'stroke': 'grey'}).encode(
    alt.Y('Crop:N').sort(by_area).axis(None),
    alt.X('ProdChange:Q').scale(reverse=True).title("% Change in Productivity")
)


# funky beeswarm function
offsets = []
for cat, g in df.groupby("Crop"):
    ys = []

    for _, row in g.iterrows():
        y = row["ProdChange"]

        # count nearby points
        nearby = sum(abs(y - yy) < 5 for yy in ys)

        if nearby == 0:
            offset = 0
        else:
            k = (nearby + 1) // 2
            offset = k if nearby % 2 else -k

        offsets.append(offset * 3)
        ys.append(y)

df["offset"] = offsets

boxplots = base.mark_circle(opacity=1).encode(
    alt.X('ProdChange:Q').scale(reverse=True).title("% Change in Productivity"),
    alt.Y('Crop:N').sort(by_area).axis(None),
    yOffset='offset:Q',
    color=alt.Color('Crop:N').scale(scheme='tableau20').legend(None),
)

shade = alt.Chart(pd.DataFrame({
    'bot': [-100],
    'top': [0]
})).mark_rect(
    color='grey',
    opacity=0.2
).encode(
    x='top:Q',
    x2='bot:Q'
)

medians = base.mark_point(color='black', shape='stroke', size=300, angle=90, opacity=0.6).encode(
    alt.Y('Crop:N').sort(by_area).axis(None),
    alt.X('median(ProdChange):Q')
)

base = alt.Chart(indices, width=WIDTH, height=300).transform_fold(
    ['Area', 'Yield', 'Productivity'],
    as_=['key', 'Index Value']
).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').scale(domain=[2014, 2025]),
    alt.Y('Index Value:Q').title('Index Value'),
    color=alt.Color('key:N').legend(title=" ")
    ).transform_filter(
    crop
)

opacity = 1

points = base.mark_circle(opacity=opacity)
    
lines = base.mark_line(opacity=opacity).encode(
    strokeWidth=alt.when('datum.key == "Productivity"').then(alt.StrokeWidthValue(3)).otherwise(alt.StrokeWidthValue(2))
)

baseline = alt.Chart().mark_rule(color='black', strokeDash=[1,1]).encode(
    y=alt.datum(100)
)

area = alt.Chart(indices, width=WIDTH, height=300).mark_area(opacity=0.2).encode(
    alt.X('Year:T', timeUnit='year').scale(domain=[2014, 2025]).title('Year'),
    y=alt.Y("Area:Q"),
    y2="Yield:Q",
    color = alt.ColorValue("grey")
).transform_filter(
    crop
)







alt.vconcat(
    alt.concat((boxplots + shade), middle, bar, spacing=5),
     baseline + points + lines + area, center=False, autosize='pad'
).configure_axis(
    grid=False
).resolve_legend(
    color='independent'
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent'
)

# .resolve_scale(
#     strokeWidth='independent',
#     color='independent',
#     size='independent'
# )
```
